title: taraxacum subhirtellum
intro: Taraxacum subhirtellum, also known as the lesser hawk's-beard or lesser dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat fever, rheumatism, and other conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum subhirtellum include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting liver function, making it a popular herbal remedy for various health issues. Taraxacum subhirtellum can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and capsules, making it easily accessible for those looking to harness its medicinal properties.
